input: what is the Lakers record in 2023
output: SELECT t.nickname, COUNT(CASE WHEN pgl.wl = 'W' THEN 1 END) AS wins, COUNT(CASE WHEN pgl.wl = 'L' THEN 1 END) AS losses FROM team t JOIN player_game_log pgl ON t.team_id = pgl.team_id WHERE pgl.season_id = 22023 AND t.nickname = 'Lakers' GROUP BY t.nickname, pgl.game_id HAVING COUNT(pgl.player_id) = (SELECT COUNT(player_id) FROM player_game_log WHERE game_id = pgl.game_id AND team_id = pgl.team_id);
